title: Reality as Ideological Construct: A Reading of Five Novels by Philip K. Dick
author: Peter Fitting
card_summary: A Marxist-informed scholarly article from Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 10, No. 2, July 1983) reading five Dick novels through the lens of ideology and constructed reality. Fitting examines how Dick's fictional realities expose the ideological construction of consensus reality. 19 pages.
